creator: johann@egenetics.com
text:
- The patch in files/patch-Generate.py has been recalled by Martel's author.
  It resulted in a huge performance hit, while the problem it "fixed" turned
  out to be not a bug, but a limitation of Martel's design.  See:
  http://www.biopython.org/pipermail/biopython-dev/2000-December/000215.html
- File to be removed:  files/patch-Generate.py
- Bumped PORTREVISION
